electroacoustic.frequency_range_hz: 30-80 (usable bandwidth in [K1SB_60] preset; enclosure low-frequency limit 30 Hz at -10 dB)
electroacoustic.directivity: Omnidirectional subwoofer (cardioid behavior achievable in arrays via Soundvision-defined configurations); used as a vertically flyable companion to K1/K2 line sources
electroacoustic.components: 2 x 15" neodymium cone drivers (4" voice coil, magnesium die-cast basket, weather-resistant), bass-reflex enclosure with progressive-profile L-Vents; 1200 W RMS power handling

operating_modes: Subwoofer / contour mode ([K1SB_60]) for added low-end impact below the mains, 30-80 Hz
LF line-source extension / throw mode ([K1SB_X]) giving the K1-SB the same response as the K1 low section so it can extend the sub-low line source for enhanced low-frequency throw
recommended_amplifiers: LA-RAK II AVB (touring rack housing three LA12X)

connection.input_connector: 1x 4-point speakON (NL4) IN; pins 1+/1- carry the LF signal, pins 2+/2- not linked
connection.breakouts: Fed from an LA12X via SP (4-point speakON) cables or via DOSUB-LA8 breakout (8-point PA-COM to 4x 2-point speakON) for driving four passive subs from one amplifier

physical.cabinet: Premium-grade Baltic birch plywood; coated steel grille with acoustically neutral 3D fabric; dark grey brown Pantone 426C (also pure white RAL 9010)

modes: Flown as a standalone subwoofer array on a K1-BUMP
Flown at the top of a vertical array of K1, K2 or KARA enclosures (shares the captive 4-point rigging system)
Ground-stacked on K1-CHARIOT (up to four enclosures) or on a K1-PLA dolly
deployment.max_per_flown_array: 20 enclosures (safe limit) / 24 (maximum limit) on a K1-BUMP

usage: Dedicated companion subwoofer for K1 and K2 line sources; one LA12X channel feeds one K1-SB, and a single LA12X (4 outputs) can drive up to 4 enclosures wired in parallel off one preset.

Use the [K1SB_60] preset (30-80 Hz) in subwoofer/contour mode to add low-end impact and weight beneath the mains; use [K1SB_X] to make the K1-SB behave like the K1 low section so it extends the sub-low line source for greater LF throw.

Because it integrates the same captive 4-point rigging and inter-enclosure angle set as K1, it can be flown directly in-line at the top of a K1/K2/KARA hang, or flown as its own array, with a Soundvision-verified safe limit of 20 (24 max) per K1-BUMP.

Recommended pairing is roughly one K1-SB per K1, mounted behind the array (about 0.5-1 m front-panel spacing when in-line); follow the manual's pre-alignment delays (e.g. K1 = 6 ms with [K1SB_60], 0 ms when running [K1SB_X] together with [K1]).

Single 4-point speakON input carries only the LF pair (1+/1-), so it must be driven by an L-Acoustics amplified controller (LA12X); confirm the per-controller enclosure count and total impedance before connecting.
Heavy (83 kg) IP45-rated touring sub; verify rigging load and structural capacity in Soundvision for any flown or mixed-array deployment rather than relying on a fixed count.
source_manual: K1-SB Owner's Manual (EN), version 2.0 (shared K1 / K1-SB owner's manual)
